case_title: DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS VS. INTERNATIONAL TRAINING RESOURCES, LLC

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF DEPARTMENT OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS AS TO DEFENDANT INTERNATIONAL TRAINING RESOURCES, LLC JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
